---
title: "org.Hs.eg.db3: parquet-based AnnotationDbi for Hs"
shorttitle: "outlier dytection methods"
author: "Vincent J. Carey, stvjc at channing.harvard.edu"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{org.Hs.eg.db3: parquet-based AnnotationDbi for Hs}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
output:
  BiocStyle::html_document:
    highlight: pygments
    number_sections: yes
    theme: united
    toc: yes
---

# Introduction

There are two key characteristics of the org.Xx packages.

- environments that manage mappings between identifiers;
- database tables that respond to AnnotationDbi::select and possibly other
SQLite-oriented processes.

We are moving away from SQLite and the Annotation pipeline.  This
package is intended to be more maintainable.

# Environment example

```{r lkenv1, message=FALSE}
library(org.Hs.eg.db3)
org.Hs.egGO
toTable(org.Hs.egGO) |> head(10)
```
